title: Straight shooting from Saps
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS  -  The Garden Route District is currently hosting the annual Police National Practical Pistol Championship at the On Target Shooting Range outside George from Tuesday to Thursday, 3 to 5 February.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The Garden Route District is currently hosting the annual Police National Practical Pistol Championship at the On Target Shooting Range outside George from Tuesday to Thursday, 3 to 5 February."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The championship officially got under way with a formal opening ceremony during which the district police commissioner, Major General Phumzile Cetyana, welcomed all the participants from several provinces across the country.","html":"The championship officially got under way with a formal opening ceremony during which the district police commissioner, Major General Phumzile Cetyana, welcomed all the participants from several provinces across the country."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"He also fired the first shot, officially opening the shooting range for the competition."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Altogether 140 police officers took part in the three-day championship.","html":"Altogether 140 police officers took part in the three-day championship."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Unlike traditional target shooting, practical pistol shooting requires competitors to move continuously while engaging targets from sometimes awkward positions and always against the clock.","html":"Unlike traditional target shooting, practical pistol shooting requires competitors to move continuously while engaging targets from sometimes awkward positions and always against the clock."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The competition was held at the On Target Shooting Range. Photo: Jeff Ayliffe","html":"The competition was held at the On Target Shooting Range. Photo: Jeff Ayliffe"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The participants are scored on accuracy, power and speed, with ‘power’ referring to the calibre of ammunition used.","html":"The participants are scored on accuracy, power and speed, with ‘power’ referring to the calibre of ammunition used."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The members compete in several categories throughout the championship."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The event concluded with an award ceremony recognising top performances across the various categories.","html":"The event concluded with an award ceremony recognising top performances across the various categories."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
